summary: Infraestrutura operacional completa: CI/CD pipeline (GitHub Actions adaptado para npm+Fastify+SQLite3), GMUD-001 aprovada para primeiro release, guia de instalação detalhado com troubleshooting Windows

ci_cd_pipeline.description: Pipeline GitHub Actions com 6 jobs: code-quality → unit-tests → build → change-gate → deploy-production → quality-gate

stack_adapted.deploy_strategy: Node.js server + static hosting (NOT Vercel monolithic)

gmud.title: Release Inicial — ECP Banco Digital v3.0 (MVP)
gmud.rollback_strategy: SQLite backup + PM2 stop + static file replacement

github_actions.name: VITE_API_URL
github_actions.purpose: URL da API em produção para build do frontend

github_actions.name: VERCEL_TOKEN
github_actions.purpose: Deploy automático do frontend (se usar Vercel)

production_env.name: JWT_SECRET
production_env.purpose: Chave secreta para assinatura de tokens JWT — NUNCA usar valor padrão

production_env.name: DATABASE_PATH
production_env.purpose: Caminho para o arquivo SQLite em produção

deployment_strategy.type: Simple deploy (not blue-green or canary — appropriate for MVP)
deployment_strategy.api: Node.js process manager (PM2) on VPS/VM or Railway/Render/Fly.io
deployment_strategy.database: SQLite3 file on same server as API — backup before each deploy
deployment_strategy.rollback: PM2 rollback + SQLite file restore from backup

next_step: HITL #11 — Humano avalia infraestrutura operacional (CI/CD, GMUD, instalação)
